mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_history (book_id, old_price, new_price, modifier_name, change_reason) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{oldPrice}, #{newPrice}, #{modifierName}, #{changeReason})
mapper.select: SELECT id, book_id, old_price, new_price, modifier_name, change_reason, created_at FROM price_history WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
